infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: SmartShopper needs your location to remind you about your shopping list when you're near saved stores.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: SmartShopper needs background location access to detect when you're near saved stores.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SmartShopper needs your location to find nearby stores.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: SmartShopper needs your location to remind you about your shopping list when you're near saved stores.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: SmartShopper needs background location to detect when you're near saved stores.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: SmartShopper needs your location to find nearby stores.
